name: West Baden Springs Community Park
description: Come play pickleball at West Baden Springs Community Park in West Baden Springs, IN! There are 3 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include wheelchair accessibility, lights, and water.

name: West Baden Springs Hotel
description:
Resort
Resort guests have first access to courts if reserved. If not reserved by guests, access is free to community players. Parking along street.
open_play_schedule: Locals just show up and play. If reserved by hotel guests they get access.
